27378.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
27378.description: In Hessle, near Hull, Nick, the team, and hundreds of kind volunteers step up to help roofer Darren and his sons. He was married to childhood love Sarah, and is dad to Harvey, step-dad to Mike and adopted dad to Oliver who is severely disabled.
27378.category: Home & Garden, Doe-het-zelf, Bouwen en verbouwen, Kunstnijverheid

32221.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
32221.description: In Torquay, the team and local kind volunteers step up to help single dad Stuart, who has suffered with progressive multiple sclerosis since his now 15-year-old daughter Lauren was born. His primary carer is his mum, Grandma Lin, who is blind.
32221.category: Home & Garden, Doe-het-zelf, Bouwen en verbouwen, Kunstnijverheid
